hero.title: Excellence in Pharmaceutical Care
hero.subtitle: Specialized clinical monitoring to ensure treatment efficacy and safety. Valuing health through pharmaceutical knowledge.

search.hero_subtitle: Search for articles, events and lives on our platform.

footer.descricao: Knowledge that connects. Training that transforms. Health that evolves.

sobre.hero_subtitle: Conheça Farmácia is an organization dedicated to promoting excellence in pharmaceutical practice through the sharing of informative content, creation of training programs, and connection between healthcare professionals, students, institutions, and society — promoting practical and up-to-date knowledge.
sobre.missao_p1: To connect knowledge, people, and healthcare practices to strengthen professional performance, improve patient care, and drive the development of the pharmaceutical sector in Angola.
sobre.missao_p2: We empower pharmacy professionals nationwide with up-to-date knowledge and continuous training — in-person and online — that helps them perform their role efficiently and ethically. Our work integrates workshops, lectures, scientific events, and the production of educational content for social media, radio, and television, with a focus on social impact, technical quality, and interdisciplinarity.
sobre.card1_text: We regularly share content about the pharmaceutical field through social media, radio, television, and health education campaigns — with up-to-date information and practical tips to improve professional practice.
sobre.card2_text: We organize training in various areas of pharmacy, empowering professionals and students through continuous education and quality scientific events — promoting ethical, critical, and collaborative practice.
sobre.pull_quote: "Knowledge that connects. Training that transforms. Health that evolves."
